exemplar.title: M25 #5: To what extent do you agree with the claim "all models are wrong, but some are useful" (attributed to George Box)? Discuss with reference to mathematics and one other area of knowledge.

detailedExemplarData.title: M25 #5: To what extent do you agree with the claim "all models are wrong, but some are useful" (attributed to George Box)? Discuss with reference to mathematics and one other area of knowledge.

strengths: Sustained and explicit focus on the prescribed title, consistently returning to the tension between âwrongâ and âuseful.â

Effective integration of two areas of knowledge (Mathematics and Human Sciences) with discipline-appropriate, specific examples (Newtonian kinematics, Markov chains, neoclassical models, Recognition-Primed Decision model).
Logical and coherent sequencing of arguments, with relevant evidence supporting claims.
Clear awareness and evaluation of alternative perspectives, including consideration of potential harms arising from oversimplified models.
Discussion of implications of simplifications for prediction and understanding, demonstrating depth of insight into the knowledge question.
weaknesses: Introductory definitions are verbose and at times repetitive; the central knowledge question could be more sharply framed.
A few paragraphs drift into narrative of examples without explicitly tying back to the knowledge question, briefly disrupting the evaluative thread.
Underlying assumptions (e.g., memorylessness in Markov models, rational-agent assumptions in economics) are mentioned but not unpacked in sufficient depth.
Minor lapses in structure and transitions (sentences trailing off, incomplete connections) momentarily affect clarity.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The official examinerâs total of 9 reflects performance that borders on the 9â10 band: arguments are clear, coherent, effectively supported by specific examples, and the implications of simplifications are considered. Although minor structural lapses and limited depth in unpacking assumptions prevent a full band-10 rating, the essayâs sustained focus, well-sequenced analysis, and engagement with alternative viewpoints merit 9/10. Assigning 9 ensures alignment with the examinerâs final mark while acknowledging the workâs high quality and areas for refinement.

annotations.comment: The holistic summary of human sciences examples maintains clarity and acknowledges both model power and constraints, reinforcing the central claim across AoKs.

The introductory definitions of âwrongâ and âusefulâ are verbose and repetitive, diluting the central focus. The student should tighten these definitions and present a concise thesis early to sharpen the evaluative thread.
Consider adopting more active language to enhance clarity and engagement, rephrasing passive constructions when presenting evaluations.
The paragraph ending â...does not diminish its abilityâ is incomplete, interrupting the flow. Ensure each argument paragraph has a clear conclusion before transitioning.
The central knowledge question is implied but not explicitly formulated. Articulating the question clearly and signposting how each example addresses it will reinforce coherence.
The student accurately restates the prescribed title and clearly identifies the Areas of Knowledge, establishing a sustained focus that aligns with the essayâs central claim.
The student relies heavily on tertiary online sources; integrating peer-reviewed journal articles for theoretical models would strengthen source credibility.
The analysis of neoclassical supply-and-demand models effectively links oversimplification to real harm in the 2008 financial crisis, demonstrating awareness of competing viewpoints.
The Recognition-Primed Decision model is well chosen, and its application to sports demonstrates clearly how simplified cognitive models can aid rapid decision-making under pressure.
The conclusion reiterates the main claim but could more explicitly connect to the knowledge question and its implications for knowledge producers.
The essay moves abruptly into references; including a brief concluding reflection or final insight before the bibliography would strengthen closure.
The referencing style is inconsistent, mixing retrieval dates and hyperlinks. Adopting a uniform format (e.g., APA) and prioritizing peer-reviewed sources would enhance academic rigor.
Introduce a clear roadmap in the introduction that outlines how the discussion of both AoKs will be structured to guide the reader through your argument.

The explanation of Newtonian kinematics demonstrates clear understanding of simplifying assumptionsâsuch as ignoring frictionâand links effectively to aeronautical engineering, reinforcing model usefulness.
The evaluation of Markov chains notes limitations but does not unpack the memorylessness assumption. Discuss how this abstraction affects forecast accuracy and interpretation.

The link between probabilistic forecasts (e.g., stating â60% likelihoodâ) and practical decision-making is well articulated, illustrating how acknowledging uncertainty enhances a modelâs usefulness.
While the mathematics section conclusion restates the claim, it lacks synthesis of the kinematics and Markov examples. Integrating insights would reinforce the overarching argument.

The assertion that mathematical axioms are âself-evident in their truthâ overlooks that axioms themselves are abstractions. Evaluating these foundational assumptions would deepen the critical analysis.
This paragraph is dense; consider breaking it into separate points for clarity, each addressing a distinct dimension of model evaluation.
To strengthen your critique, cite more advanced models (e.g., drag equations) to contrast simplistic kinematic models and illustrate varying degrees of âwrongnessâ and âusefulness.â
The essay could deepen evaluation by referencing behavioural economics critiques that challenge rational-agent assumptions, demonstrating a broader spectrum of perspectives.
The transition to an additional point of view on abstraction is unfinished, disrupting coherence. Complete or remove partial sentences to maintain flow.
To enrich analysis, contrast Marshallian models with agent-based simulations that capture complex interactions, illustrating different degrees of model fidelity.
The evaluation would benefit from assessing empirical support for the modelâs effectiveness, for example by citing studies on decision accuracy improvements in athletes.
Consider expanding on how these insights might inform policy or research methods, offering a forward-looking perspective on model application.
Consider discussing the ethical implications of forecast errors (e.g., evacuation decisions) to illustrate broader consequences of model âwrongness.â
The comparative analysis of simplification in mathematics versus human sciences provides a nuanced understanding of Boxâs claim across both AoKs.
Some references lack standard publication details (e.g., publisher, journal volume); ensure full bibliographic entries to meet academic conventions.

The essay does not
reach a standard
described by levels
1â5 or is not a
response to one of
the prescribed titles
on the list for the
current session.
The discussion is weakly connected to the title. While there may be links to the areas of knowledge, any relevant points are descriptive or consist only of unsupported assertions.

The discussion is connected to the title and makes superficial or limited links to areas of knowledge. The discussion is largely descriptive. Limited arguments are offered but they are unclear and are not supported by effective examples.

The discussion
is focused on
the title and is
developed with
some links to
areas of
knowledge.
Arguments are
offered and are
supported by
examples.
There is some
awareness of
different points
of view.

The discussion is focused on the title and is linked effectively to areas of knowledge. Arguments are clear, coherent and supported by examples. There is awareness and some evaluation of different points of view.

The discussion has a sustained focus on the title and is linked effectively to areas of knowledge. Arguments are clear, coherent and effectively supported by specific examples. The implications of arguments are considered. There is clear awareness and evaluation of different points of view.
